query:
-- System Diagnostics table for health checks
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_diagnostics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  category ENUM('database', 'api', 'entity', 'token', 'compliance', 'security', 'performance', 'integration') NOT NULL,
  check_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('healthy', 'warning', 'critical', 'unknown') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
  message TEXT,
  details JSON,
  last_checked_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

-- Diagnostic Runs table for tracking scheduled and manual runs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnostic_runs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  run_type ENUM('scheduled', 'manual') NOT NULL,
  triggered_by VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('running', 'completed', 'failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
  total_checks INT DEFAULT 0,
  passed_checks INT DEFAULT 0,
  warning_checks INT DEFAULT 0,
  failed_checks INT DEFAULT 0,
  summary TEXT,
  started_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  duration_ms INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Self Corrections table for auto-fix history
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS self_corrections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  diagnostic_run_id INT,
  issue_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  issue_description TEXT NOT NULL,
  correction_action VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  correction_details JSON,
  status ENUM('pending', 'applied', 'failed', 'rolled_back') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  applied_at TIMESTAMP,
  rolled_back_at TIMESTAMP,
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_diagnostic_run (diagnostic_run_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

-- Diagnostic Schedules table for configuring intervals
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnostic_schedules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  cron_expression VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  last_run_at TIMESTAMP,
  next_run_at TIMESTAMP,
  categories JSON,
  notify_on_failure BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notify_on_warning BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
